channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Riding the GenAI Wave: Microsoft's Quest for Revenue
item.description: Microsoft's multibillion-dollar investments in generative AI (genAI) have propelled it to become the world's second-most valuable company. However, the time has come for the tech giant to start generating serious revenue from its genAI investments, particularly with Microsoft 365 Copilot.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Federal Trade Commission Awards $25 Million to Scam Victims
item.description: Victims of a tech support scam will receive over $25 million in payments this week, the FTC announced Monday. The scam targeted computer owners with fake security issues and deceptive tactics.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
